# unraid_version (Data Source)

Retrieves version information from the Unraid server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "unraid_version" "this" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `api` (String) The Unraid API version.
- `kernel` (String) The Linux kernel version.
- `unraid` (String) The Unraid OS version.
